message:
test: add git-aware branch strictness and branch info tests

Add integration tests for branch-aware command evaluation:

- evaluator.rs: test that relaxed branches downgrade deny to allow,
  and protected branches retain deny for blocked severity levels
- git.rs: test get_branch_info_at_path for named branches, detached
  HEAD, and non-git directories
- Both modules gain run_git/init_git_repo helpers that create real
  temporary git repos for realistic test isolation
- Update beads issues.jsonl with latest issue state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
